summary_text: 以下が、`issue` 起点で linked runner を使う最短 E2E（3ステップ）です。 `x-auto-quoted-author-sync` だけを対象にして、余計な失敗要因を減らしています。 1. **Preflight（manifest + issue 到達性）** ```bash cd /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public export REPO="cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator" export ISSUE="<issue_number>" bash scripts/check-linked-systems-integrity.sh gh issue view "${ISSUE}" --repo "${REPO}" --json number,title,url,state | jq . ``` 2. **Issue起点で linked runner 実行（execute, fail-fast）** ```bash export OUT_DIR=".fugue/local-run/e2e-linked" mkdir -p "${OUT_DIR}" cat > "${OUT_DIR}/quoted-seed.json" <<'JSON' [ { "cursorvers_post_id": "probe-linked-e2e-20260407", "source_url": "https://x.com/rohanpaul_ai/status/2041254260621676792?s=20", "author_handle": "rohanpaul_ai", "display_name": "Rohan Paul", "topic_tags": ["probe"], "conclusion_tag": "probe", "pattern_tag": "probe", "metadata": {"probe": true} } ] JSON X_AUTO_QUOTED_AUTHOR_SYNC_SEED_INPUT="${PWD}/${OUT_DIR}/quoted-seed.json" \ X_AUTO_QUOTED_AUTHOR_SYNC_WRITE_MODE="required" \ bash scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh \ --issue "${ISSUE}" \ --repo "${REPO}" \ --mode execute \ --systems x-auto-quoted-author-sync \ --out-dir "${OUT_DIR}" \ --comment ``` 3. **出力確認（run artifact + adapter artifact）** ```bash RUN_DIR="$(ls -dt ${OUT_DIR}/linked-issue-${ISSUE}-* | head -n1)" echo "RUN_DIR=${RUN_DIR}" jq . "${RUN_DIR}/integrated.json" jq . "${RUN_DIR}/results.json" cat "${RUN_DIR}/systems/x-auto-quoted-author-sync/xauto-quoted-author-sync.meta" ``` 確認すべき出力ファイル - `${RUN_DIR}/summary.md` - `${RUN_DIR}/integrated.json` - `${RUN_DIR}/results.json` - `${RUN_DIR}/systems/x-auto-quoted-author-sync/result.json` - `${RUN_DIR}/systems/x-auto-quoted-author-sync/xauto-quoted-author-sync.meta` - `${RUN_DIR}/systems/x-auto-quoted-author-sync/xauto-quoted-author-sync.result.json` - `${RUN_DIR}/systems/x-auto-quoted-author-sync/xauto-quoted-author-sync.bridge.json` (書込試行のHTTP結果)
